pom.xml.general_idea: Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 API dependency for architectural testing.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 Engine dependency for architectural testing.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web dependency for standardized error handling.
Add Micrometer Prometheus Registry dependency for metrics export.
Add Dropwizard Metrics Core dependency for metrics collection.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for security testing.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency for testing utilities.
Remove Spring Cloud Cloud Foundry Connector dependency.
Remove Spring Cloud Spring Service Connector dependency.
Remove Spring Cloud Local Config Connector dependency.
Remove Spark Metrics Reporter dependency.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin with Java 11 source/target and annotation processors.
Add maven-checkstyle-plugin for code style enforcement.
Add maven-javadoc-plugin for documentation generation.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin for integration testing.
Add maven-idea-plugin for IntelliJ IDEA project generation.
Add maven-resources-plugin for resource filtering.
Add Jib Maven Plugin for container image building.
Add properties-maven-plugin for reading project properties.
Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 and updated dependencies.
Remove maven-sortpom-plugin as it is no longer needed.
Remove gatling-maven-plugin for load testing.
Remove maven-processor-plugin in favor of compiler plugin annotation processors.
Update maven-enforcer-plugin to require Java 8-15 and Maven 3.6+.
Update maven-war-plugin configuration for static resources.
Add frontend-maven-plugin for Node.js/NPM integration.
Add git-commit-id-plugin for build metadata.
Update JaCoCo plugin to support separate unit and integration test coverage.
Update Jib plugin to use AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin to enforce alphabetical test execution order and exclude integration tests.
Configure maven-failsafe-plugin to run integration tests with alphabetical order and correct class directory for Spring Boot repackaging.
Add sonar-maven-plugin to plugin management for code quality analysis.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin in plugin management to handle repackaging and main class definition.
Add a 'no-liquibase' profile to allow disabling Liquibase migrations during startup.
Add an 'api-docs' profile to enable API documentation generation.
Add a 'tls' profile to enable TLS configuration.
Add a 'webpack' profile to manage frontend build via frontend-maven-plugin.
Update 'dev' profile to include Undertow, DevTools, and H2 dependencies, and activate composite profiles.
Update 'prod' profile to use Undertow instead of Tomcat and add build-info generation.
Configure frontend-maven-plugin in 'prod' profile to install node/npm and run webpack production build.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to 'prod' profile to generate git information for the application.
Add a 'war' profile to enable building a WAR file using maven-war-plugin.
Add an 'IDE' profile to include MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator dependencies for IDE support.
Add an 'eclipse' profile to configure m2e lifecycle mapping and ignore specific plugin executions.
Add an 'e2e' profile for end-to-end testing with specific final name and repackaging configuration.
Remove yeoman-maven-plugin from 'prod' profile as it is replaced by frontend-maven-plugin.
Update maven-clean-plugin configuration to clean target/classes/static/ instead of old webapp directories.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganize .editorconfig to apply specific indentation rules to frontend and config files while keeping global defaults.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent_style/size to global scope and added [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] block with indent_size = 2.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes file with a comprehensive, community-standard configuration to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple wildcard rules with detailed lists for text, binary, documents, graphics, configs, and media files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Refactor .gitignore to use modern directory-only patterns and add specific JHipster/Webpack cache exclusions.
.gitignore.human_impl: Changed patterns like `/node_modules/**` to `node_modules/` and added `.cache-loader/`, `.awcache/`, and `.eslintcache`.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add ignore rules for Visual Studio Code and STS4 to support modern development environments.
Ensure Maven Wrapper JAR is not ignored, complementing the existing Gradle Wrapper exception.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration target.
Rename the application base name to reflect the new project identity.
Change the Java package name to the new namespace.
Update the package folder path to match the new package name.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to actual booleans for clusteredHttpSession.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to actual booleans for searchEngine.
Remove the deprecated Grunt frontend builder configuration as it is no longer supported in newer JHipster versions.
Remove the explicit Java 8 version setting as the project is migrating to Java 11.
Explicitly define the application type as monolith.
Specify Gatling and Protractor as the test frameworks.
Define the supported languages for the application.
Explicitly set the server port to 8080.
Disable social sign-in functionality.
Regenerate the remember-me key for security.
Enable Sass for CSS preprocessing.
Set the JHipster prefix for generated classes.
Disable message broker usage.
Disable service discovery.
Set npm as the client package manager.
Set AngularX as the client framework.
Explicitly set Ehcache as the cache provider.
Enable Hibernate cache.
Disable reactive stack.
Initialize empty list for other modules.
Set empty entity suffix.
Set DTO suffix for data transfer objects.
Set no specific client theme.
Initialize empty list for blueprints.
Disable embeddable launch script.
Record the creation timestamp of the application.
Ensure client generation is not skipped.
Ensure server generation is not skipped.
Ensure user management generation is not skipped.
Ensure identifier length checks are not skipped.
Ensure fake data generation is not skipped.
Initialize empty list for custom pages.
Set empty client theme variant.
Enable the admin UI.
Set English as the native language.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster documentation including development, testing, and Docker sections.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt-based build system and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI ecosystem.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, requirejs; Added @angular/core, @angular/cli, webpack

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing setup with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma, jasmine-core; Added jest, protractor, @angular-builders/jest

package.json.general_idea: Introduce ESLint and Prettier for code quality and formatting, replacing older JSHint setups.
Update package name, version, and description to reflect the specific application identity.
Add comprehensive npm scripts for CI/CD pipelines, including backend testing, Docker management, and e2e execution.
package.json.human_impl: Added scripts like ci:backend:test, docker:db:up, ci:e2e:run

package.json.general_idea: Include dependencies required for WebSocket communication in the frontend.
Add modern UI component libraries and icons for the Angular application.
Add utility libraries for date handling, cookies, and storage management.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the H2 database alias to reflect the specific application name instead of a generic label.
src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.human_impl: Changed alias from 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' and updated the database name to 'jhipsterwebsocketsampleapplication'.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Allow remote access to the H2 web console by enabling the 'allow others' setting.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's default colored banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and standard JDBC URL format required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Change Hibernate dialect package path to match JHipster's custom dialect location.
Remove deprecated Hibernate naming strategy property which is no longer supported in newer Hibernate versions.
Migrate cache configuration from legacy Spring Boot 1.x format to JHipster-specific properties.
Update logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot 2.x level format.
Add Spring Boot DevTools configuration for development profile.
Add JHipster-specific CORS configuration for development profile.
Add JHipster-specific security configuration including remember-me key.
Add JHipster-specific mail configuration with base URL.
Add JHipster-specific Logstash configuration for log forwarding.
Update Liquibase contexts to include faker for sample data loading.
Add Jackson serialization configuration for pretty printing.
Add Thymeleaf cache configuration for development profile.
Update message cache duration to use ISO 8601 format.
Add H2 console configuration to disable it in development.
Include api-docs profile in active profiles for development.
Add documentation headers explaining configuration sections.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool for better performance and JDK 11 compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.type to com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource and removed com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect configuration to support newer MySQL versions and JDK 11 environment.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed explicit database-platform and database settings, relying on auto-detection or updated properties.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove deprecated EJB3NamingStrategy which is incompatible with newer Hibernate versions used in JDK 11 migrations.
Update cache configuration to align with JHipster 6.x standards and JDK 11 compatible libraries.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Replaced top-level cache config with jhipster.cache.ehcache settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate from legacy metrics libraries (Spark/Graphite) to Spring Boot Actuator metrics for JDK 11 compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed metrics.spark and metrics.graphite blocks, added management.metrics.export.prometheus.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot logging levels instead of custom metrics logging.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added logging.level.ROOT and specific package levels, removed metrics-based logging.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add modern server features like graceful shutdown and compression supported in newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added server.shutdown: graceful and server.compression settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate custom JHipster properties to the new jhipster.* namespace structure introduced in JHipster 6.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Moved http.cache, cache, security, mail, and logging configs under jhipster: prefix.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Explicitly disable devtools in production profile to ensure stability and security in JDK 11 environment.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added spring.devtools.restart.enabled: false and spring.devtools.livereload.enabled: false.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update mail configuration to use standard Spring Boot mail properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added spring.mail.host, port, username, and password fields.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Liquibase configuration to use Spring Boot managed properties.
Update Thymeleaf configuration to use standard Spring Boot properties.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management namespace structure.
Update async thread pool configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x task execution namespace.
Move mail configuration into the standard Spring Boot mail namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: mail: host: localhost -> spring.mail.host: localhost (implied by structure change)

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Update Swagger documentation properties to align with newer JHipster/SpringFox conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: swagger: title: jhipster API -> jhipster.api-docs.title: jhipsterWebsocketSampleApplication API

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Introduce explicit JPA and Hibernate configuration properties required for Spring Boot 2.x compatibility.
Configure specific management endpoints and health probes for modern Spring Boot actuator.
Configure Micrometer metrics export and tagging for Spring Boot 2.x.
Add server servlet session cookie security settings.
Add JHipster-specific application properties for client app name and API docs.
